creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

To submitter: Does the HD Audio driver not work for you?  Can you 
confirm that you have loaded the driver with "kldload snd_hda"? 
If you have tried this and it doesn't work, please provide the 
output from "pciconf -lv", the output from "kldstat" and copies 
of any messages output when you tried loading the snd_hda module.
